title: NormalizedRecord
description: A single timestamped water-quality observation, in canonical units, as emitted by a connector. See ADR-0003 for design rationale.

source_id.description: Stable identifier for the upstream data source. Matches the connector directory name.

station_id.description: The source's native station identifier. Format varies by source.

site_ids.description: Our internal site IDs that this station informs. Resolved via the join step against data/sites.json.

observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp from the source. NEVER our ingestion time.

parameter.description: Closed enum of supported parameters. Adding a value requires updating the grading function and UI formatter.

value.description: Numeric value in canonical units (see ADR-0003).

units.description: Canonical units string. Must match the canonical-units table in ADR-0003.

raw_url.description: Direct link to the source page or row for citation. Optional but strongly encouraged.
